title: adenophora polyantha subsp. scabricalyx
intro: Adenophora polyantha subsp. scabricalyx, also known as the Korean angelica or white flowers of the genus Adenophora, is a plant species native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Adenophora polyantha subsp. scabricalyx include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and preventing infection, and it is also used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Adenophora polyantha subsp. scabricalyx include tea, decoction, and infusion, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
